evals.prompt: Fetch all my gists from GitHub
evals.expected_output: Uses typed API client with pagination support, sets Accept and Authorization headers correctly, handles Link headers for pagination
assertions: Uses Authorization: Bearer header, not URL parameter

evals.prompt: Create a new gist with a README file
evals.expected_output: Uses POST /gists endpoint with proper payload structure including files object, description, and public flag

evals.prompt: Update the content of my existing gist
evals.expected_output: Uses PATCH /gists/{gist_id} with file updates, preserves unchanged files, handles file deletion via null

evals.prompt: Check if a gist is starred
evals.expected_output: Uses GET /gists/{gist_id}/star endpoint, returns boolean based on 204 vs 404 response
assertions: No request body for this endpoint

evals.prompt: Rate limit tracking for API calls
evals.expected_output: Extracts X-RateLimit-Remaining and X-RateLimit-Reset headers, implements backoff when near limit
Uses GET /gists/{gist_id}/revisions endpoint, returns array of revision objects with timestamps

evals.prompt: Cancel a gist fetch when component unmounts
evals.expected_output: Uses AbortController for cancellation, passes signal to fetch, cleans up on unmount
Maps 401 to structured auth error, suggests token refresh, does not retry
assertions: Does not retry on auth failure

evals.prompt: Fetch a single gist by ID
evals.expected_output: Uses GET /gists/{gist_id}, returns typed Gist object with files, owner, timestamps

evals.prompt: Fork a gist to my account
evals.expected_output: Uses POST /gists/{gist_id}/forks endpoint, returns new gist object with fork reference
